channel.title: MO on Detention Pipeline
channel.description: Recent content in MO on Detention Pipeline

item.title: 287(g) JEM: Callaway County Sheriff’s Office (MO)
item.description:
287(g) agreement between ICE and Callaway County Sheriff’s Office.

Model: JEM Signed: December 2, 2025 County: Callaway County State: MO FIPS: 29027

item.description:

item.title: Mississippi County, MO — USDA Distress Profile (4 indicators)
item.description:
USDA Economic Research Service county typology flags Mississippi County, MO with 4 distress indicators:

government/corrections-dependent economy; persistent poverty (20%+ poverty rate for 30+ years); low employment ratio; low post-secondary education

Full flags: Government, Low Employment, Low PostSecondary Ed, Persistent Poverty

This county already has an IGSA detention facility. The combination of existing federal detention relationship + economic distress = high vulnerability to expansion pitch.

Nonmetro: nonmetro

Source: USDA ERS County Typology Codes, 2025 edition

item.title: NAR MEDICAL DEPOT, LLC — ICE SAINT CHARLES, MO $2,179,843
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: NAR MEDICAL DEPOT, LLC Award ID: 70CDCR21FC0000003 Amount: $2,179,842.70 Description: IHSC MEDICAL SUPPLIES (TRM) Period: 2021-01-22 to 2022-12-24 Location: SAINT CHARLES, MO (FIPS: )

item.title: NAR MEDICAL DEPOT, LLC — ICE SAINT CHARLES, MO $971,816
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: NAR MEDICAL DEPOT, LLC Award ID: 70CDCR20FC0000010 Amount: $971,816.06 Description: MEDICAL SUPPLIES FOR IHSC FACILITIES (TRM) Period: 2020-01-10 to 2021-01-22 Location: SAINT CHARLES, MO (FIPS: )
